data.title: Elon Musk Powers Dogecoin Rally — Meme Coin Jumps Over 7% After 'DOGE Will Fix It' Post
data.description: Elon Musk's favorite cryptocurrency, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE), became one of the biggest market gainers in the last 24 hours, most likely due to his social media activity.

data.title: Peter Schiff Questions 'Trump-Inspired' Bitcoin Pump: 'One Of The Promises He Did Not Make Was To Buy Any'
data.description: Influential economist Peter Schiff expressed skepticism about the surge in Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) value, attributing it to misplaced expectations of a potential Donald Trump administration’s support for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Robinhood Legend Desktop App Launches To High Demand — CEO Vlad Tenev Reveals 1,000 Early-Access Users Opted In In '46 Seconds'
data.description: Robinhood Markets Inc. unveiled its new desktop trading platform, Robinhood Legend, at the HOOD Summit 2024, marking another step in the company's transformation from a mobile-first trading app to a comprehensive wealth management platform.

data.title: Elon Musk Isn't The Only One Chasing 'Super App' Dominance In The US— Uber CEO Eyes A Slice With Potential Expedia Acquisition
data.description: Uber Technologies Inc. is reportedly exploring the possibility of acquiring Expedia Group Inc., although discussions are in early stages and a deal may not materialize.

data.title: Cathie Wood Continues To Sell Shares Of Jack Dorsey's Bitcoin-Focused Company Block — Ark Also Dumps Moderna, Robinhood Stock
data.description:
On Wednesday, Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest made significant trades involving Block Inc (NYSE:SQ) and Moderna Inc (NASDAQ:MRNA).



The SQ Trade
